      - Data Curation | papers: db1afe3b3cd4cd90e41fbba65d3075dd5aebb61e; fbe25e4f069a19dc63daca27b7c98cff338663b9; f3a6115e5fb2237df938976e005468f0b18da797; 18e7ab056c16928d8f9539509a4b366889106d97; 40e0b9361d88b1879891eb6d16de110b30bf6c62; 6713f623e0c7ebc1c94c58a1c0a650e9a204182b; a38e0f993e4805ba8a9beae4c275c91ffcec01df; a4929de687f3c6937dabbf733258af635781d3c4; acbdbf49f9bc3f151b93d9ca9a06009f4f6eb269; 3cac56572497ba51c71da66bd207e7a48b2c758f; b45ec1cb2ba6b2d1ac24723fa836aee06a3db97a; 1bed34f2c23b97fd18de359cf62cd92b3ba612c3; 269df328eec08b56b7b1f38a7555797fe2b999b6; 1a53e7446274016f737236bdd48e3ff05d966384; 8e773b1840b894603c06b677a0f15ebcf0f26378; 57d1e7ac339e783898f2c3b1af55737cbeee9fc5; 5cbe278b65a81602a864184bbca37de91448a5f5; 55ad5e818cfed72317576027fb33a9609210d592; e402dd77eba504ea93bc38e2a052398bb95db351; 8a4fc5f00cd4aca61e148e46a2125c3a406719f1; 2577d053f8aab912d29b424e1f09133d83740fd2; 1b4c19168410fb2690d285b205ab2281793db81a; 1012d2a3281dbb40c22e25652b57fc532180f59d; bafe023fb072045dc0cd50316382a61c8dcb9fae; d6045d2ccc9c09ca1671348de86d07da6bc28eea; 6c1e1cc1e0e1f8fd026fe517607b2d4535565fa7; f1bd7ea3a63b78a60b5d90d91fdb4a1d7ac0de8e; 94a5f96308729e31c1ffbc0f0618db87795092fe; f3c339ab479cbd4782807bf47254961bc60bf293; f97413a497d47c739d41d237917e6566154647b4; 2bbb16eb8e85c64608af9712724951f070e01910; acb66323a032d1244de4b621bc944c2b039f5ac3; af5c7848417882012203ac21399977ebda695a2b
